overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a first-person perspective swimming through coastal waters during golden hour. The scene transitions from shallow shoreline with driftwood, across a seaweed-covered seabed, to open ocean with rocky cliffs emerging through atmospheric haze.

events.description: dead branches exit frame right as camera moves past shoreline debris into open shallows

agents.ego_description: moving forward through shallow turquoise water near the shore, passing weathered driftwood

entered.detail: weathered tree branches and roots partially submerged in the clear shallow water
large rock formation visible in the distance beyond the breaking waves
white-capped waves breaking in the open water beyond the shallows

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at the water's edge during golden hour, with weathered driftwood visible on the right and waves breaking in the distance. The camera moves steadily forward through the clear turquoise shallows, passing the submerged branches as they drift out of frame.

events.description: camera tilts downward to focus on seabed as water depth increases and shore elements fade from view
camera begins to tilt upward from seabed toward the surface and horizon

agents.ego_description: gliding over the sandy bottom observing scattered seaweed, shells, and light caustics on the ocean floor

entered.detail: sandy ocean floor visible through the clear shallow water with light patterns dancing across it
clusters of brown seaweed and marine debris scattered across the submerged sand

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts downward to explore the seabed, revealing a sandy bottom covered with seaweed patches and scattered shells. The shoreline elements fade into the distance as the perspective focuses on the underwater terrain, with shimmering light caustics playing across the sand.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal waters with rocky shoreline

events.description: emerging from shallow seabed to open water with horizon line and distant rocky coastline becoming visible

agents.ego_description: swimming through ocean swells toward the rocky coastline emerging on the left through the hazy golden light

entered.detail: steep rocky cliffs and boulders lining the shore, backlit by the golden hour sun
isolated rock formation rising from the ocean surface in the misty distance

segments.scene_description: The camera rises to reveal the open ocean horizon with waves rolling through the frame. A dramatic rocky coastline emerges on the left, backlit by warm golden light filtering through the partly cloudy sky. The scene transitions from the enclosed underwater view to the expansive coastal seascape with distant rock formations visible through the atmospheric haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins in the shallow turquoise waters of a shoreline and expands into a vast, atmospheric coastal seascape. It begins at the water's edge during golden hour, gliding forward past weathered driftwood and breaking waves. As the camera tilts downward, the perspective shifts from the surface to the seabed, where shimmering light caustics play across sandy patches of seaweed and scattered shells. The scene then opens as the camera rises again, leaving the underwater terrain behind to reveal rolling waves and an open ocean horizon. Finally, the view expands toward a dramatic rocky coastline on the left, with distant formations emerging through a warm, golden haze under a partly cloudy sky.
